name: 100% Plant Protein - Flavor Series
description_html: Consistency unlocks results, and variety helps you stay consistent. Our Vegan Protein Powder in Cappuccino flavor, features the same clean, effective 100% Plant-Based Protein you trust. This smooth, coffee-inspired blend delivers a complete amino acid profile from pea and brown rice protein, with no artificial sweeteners, gums, or fillers. With a smooth cappuccino taste, it’s perfect for upgrading your post-workout recovery shake or daily coffee ritual—without compromising on quality.

name: 100% Plant Protein 10-Travel Packs
description_html:
The 100% Plant Protein 10-Travel Packs offer convenient, single-serve portions of our smooth, complete plant-based protein—perfect for travel, races, or busy days on the go. Each pack delivers 20g of protein from a balanced blend of pea and rice, supporting muscle recovery and daily performance without compromising on taste or texture.

Free from artificial additives and NSF Certified for Sport®, these portable packs make it easy to stay consistent with your nutrition wherever life takes you.

name: 100% Plant Protein 14-Travel Packs
description_html: Protein is a fundamental macronutrient that is a critical building block of the human body and is essential to support the growth, development, and recovery of muscles. If you want your body to operate at its best, it needs ample amounts of protein. Protein is involved in one form or another in everything your body does. Our formula is made from a precise blend of pea and rice proteins, which yields a complete amino acid profile.

name: 100% Plant Protein Powder
description_html:
Momentous 100% Plant Protein delivers 20g of complete, plant-based protein sourced from pea and rice—providing a full amino acid profile to support muscle repair, recovery, and daily performance. Sourced exclusively from the U.S. and Canada, this formula is smooth, easy to mix, and free from artificial ingredients, gums, or fillers.

NSF Certified for Sport®, it’s trusted by elite athletes and everyday performers alike. Whether post-workout or as a daily nutrition boost, this protein supports strength, satiety, and clean fuel for your goals.

name: Acetyl L-Carnitine
description_html:
Acetyl L-Carnitine is a naturally occurring amino acid derivative that supports cognitive function, energy metabolism, and cellular health. It plays a key role in transporting fatty acids into the mitochondria—where they're converted into usable energy—making it especially valuable for brain and nerve cells with high energy demands.

This compound also acts as a potent antioxidant, helping protect the brain from oxidative stress while supporting focus, memory, and mental clarity. It’s ideal for individuals looking to boost cognitive performance, mood, and mitochondrial function.

name: Adaptogen Stack
description_html:
The Adaptogen Stack combines three clinically studied ingredients—Ashwagandha, Rhodiola Rosea, and L-Theanine—to help your body adapt to stress while supporting calm, focused performance. Ashwagandha and Rhodiola work to regulate the body’s stress response and reduce mental and physical fatigue, while L-Theanine promotes relaxed alertness by supporting healthy neurotransmitter activity and alpha brainwave production. 

Together, they may provide a daily foundation for emotional balance, cognitive clarity, and steady energy—helping you stay resilient and perform under pressure.

name: Alpha GPC
description_html:
Alpha GPC is a highly bioavailable form of choline that supports cognitive performance, focus, and long-term brain health. It quickly crosses the blood-brain barrier to increase acetylcholine levels—a key neurotransmitter involved in memory, attention, and learning.

Ideal for athletes, students, and professionals, Alpha GPC helps sharpen mental clarity, enhance neural communication, and may reduce cognitive decline over time. It’s a powerful tool for anyone looking to support brain performance and function at their peak.

name: Anti-Inflammatory Stack for Women
description_html:
The Anti-Inflammatory Stack for Women was developed with Dr. Stacy Sims to address inflammation and oxidative stress—particularly in women using hormonal birth control. This stack includes Creatine, Turmeric, and Vitamin D3, each selected for its role in supporting immune function, recovery, and hormone-related health.

Creatine supports cellular energy production and enhances the body's antioxidant defense. Turmeric provides powerful inflammation-fighting compounds like curcumin, while Vitamin D3 aids in immune regulation and overall resilience. Together, these ingredients help active women train harder, recover faster, and protect long-term health from the inside out.

name: Apigenin
description_html:
Apigenin is a naturally occurring flavonoid found in chamomile and other plants, known for its calming effects on the brain and its ability to support deeper, more restorative sleep. It works by activating GABA receptors and reducing neuronal activity in the forebrain—helping to ease the mind and promote relaxation.

Often used as part of a nighttime routine, Apigenin may also help lower cortisol levels and support antioxidant activity in the brain. It’s an effective, non-sedating option for improving sleep quality and managing daily stress.

name: Arnold’s Essential Stack
description_html: Arnold’s Essential Stack features two of the fundamentals he takes daily: Creatine Monohydrate and Fiber+. Together, they support strength, muscle function, cognitive performance, and gut health—the foundation of long-term performance.

name: Arnold’s Ultimate Stack
description_html: The complete foundation Arnold relies on for strength, muscle function, gut health, and long-term performance. Featuring grass-fed Whey Protein Isolate, Creatine Monohydrate, Vitamin D3 (2000 IU), and Fiber+, it supports lean muscle, power, bone density, immune resilience, and gut health in one science-backed system. Built on proven fundamentals—not trends.

name: Ashwagandha
description_html:
Momentous Ashwagandha features NooGandha®—a highly concentrated, clinically studied extract designed to support stress management, focus, and cognitive performance. Unlike traditional ashwagandha, NooGandha® promotes calm alertness without sedation, making it ideal for high-performing individuals who need to stay clear-headed under pressure.

This adaptogen helps balance cortisol levels, improve emotional resilience, and support mental clarity, making it a smart addition for anyone managing stress, training demands, or cognitive fatigue.

name: Athletic Resilience Stack
description_html:
The Athletic Resilience Stack, created in partnership with Dr. Andy Galpin, is a comprehensive system for full-body recovery, cognitive support, and immune health. This five-product stack includes Grass-Fed Whey Protein, Recovery, Collagen Peptides, Magnesium L-Threonate, and Zinc—each selected for their role in rebuilding the body and restoring the mind.

Whey Protein and Recovery fuel muscle repair and replenish nutrients post-training. Collagen Peptides support joint and tendon health, while Magnesium L-Threonate enhances cognitive recovery and sleep quality. Zinc helps support immune function and cellular repair. This stack is designed for athletes who push their limits and need to recover smarter.

name: Athletic Stack
description_html:
The Athletic Stack, developed with Dr. Andy Galpin, provides daily foundational support for active individuals through three key supplements: Multivitamin, Omega-3, and Magnesium Malate. Together, these ingredients help optimize nutrient intake, reduce inflammation, and support energy production at the cellular level.

The Multivitamin delivers essential vitamins, minerals, and phytonutrients in highly bioavailable forms to fill common dietary gaps. Omega-3s support cardiovascular and brain health while reducing exercise-induced inflammation, and Magnesium Malate aids in muscle function, recovery, and over 600 enzymatic processes. It's a powerful baseline for long-term performance and well-being.

name: Berberine
description_html:
Momentous Berberine optimizes metabolic efficiency through AMPK activation, the body’s central energy regulator. Each capsule features 550 mg of Berberine formulated as Berbevis® utilizing the Phytosome™ delivery system — a clinically validated form with 9.6× higher absorption than standard berberine. By supporting metabolic pathways, mitochondrial performance, and cardiovascular health, it helps your body use energy more efficiently — fueling sustained performance and long-term health.


NSF Certified for Sport®, Vegan, Non-GMO, and Gluten Free. Where metabolic science meets everyday performance.

name: Brain Drive
description_html:
Brain Drive is a daily nootropic formula designed to enhance mental clarity, motivation, and long-term brain health. It combines Acetyl L-Carnitine, Bacopa Monnieri, Tyrosine, and B vitamins—ingredients that support neurotransmitter production, blood flow, and cognitive resilience under stress.

Ideal for athletes, professionals, and high performers, Brain Drive helps you stay sharp, focused, and mentally energized throughout the day. Whether you're training, working, or problem-solving, it’s a powerful tool for unlocking sustained mental performance.

name: Brain Drive + Elite Sleep Stack
description_html:
The Brain Drive + Elite Sleep Stack provides targeted support for both daytime performance and nighttime recovery. Brain Drive delivers research-backed nootropics like Acetyl L-Carnitine, Bacopa Monnieri, Tyrosine, and B vitamins to sharpen focus, enhance motivation, and support brain health. Elite Sleep promotes deeper, more restful sleep with calming ingredients like Melatonin, Tart Cherry, Valerian Root, and L-Theanine.

This stack helps you stay alert and mentally dialed in during the day—while ensuring your body and brain recover overnight. Ideal for high performers looking to optimize productivity, mood, and recovery on a daily basis.

name: Brain, Body, and Sleep Stack
description_html:
Chris Williamson, host of the Modern Wisdom Podcast and Momentous partner, lives by the principle that consistency drives success. To stay sharp, well-rested, and physically resilient in the face of daily demands, Chris turns to the Brain, Body, and Sleep Stack.


This three-part stack features Omega-3 to enhance cognitive function and reduce inflammation, Magnesium L-Threonate to promote deep sleep and support memory and focus, and Tongkat Ali to help regulate stress hormones and naturally support testosterone. It’s a complete system for anyone looking to think clearly, recover deeply, and feel their best every day.

name: Calcium
description_html:
For anyone with increased calcium needs, from athletes and aging adults to those with dairy-free or plant-forward diets, Momentous Calcium offers effective support without compromise. Each single-capsule serving delivers 250 mg of elemental calcium using DimaCal®, a highly absorbable, digestive-friendly form. 


Our quick-dissolving capsule ensures rapid absorption and minimal GI discomfort. Backed by clinical research and NSF Certified for Sport®, this formula supports bone strength, muscle contraction, nerve signaling, and electrolyte balance—while meeting the highest standards for purity and performance.

name: Cognitive Power Stack
description_html:
The Cognitive Power Stack is a targeted nootropic trio—Alpha GPC, Tyrosine, and Acetyl L-Carnitine—designed to enhance mental clarity, focus, and energy metabolism. These ingredients work synergistically to support neurotransmitter production, improve brain cell communication, and reduce mental fatigue.

Alpha GPC provides bioavailable choline to support memory and cognition. Tyrosine helps maintain focus under stress by supporting dopamine and norepinephrine levels. Acetyl L-Carnitine fuels mitochondrial energy in the brain, supporting mood, memory, and long-term brain health. This stack is ideal for high-performance professionals, athletes, and anyone looking to stay sharp and focused.

name: Collagen + Creatine Stack
description_html:
The Collagen + Creatine Stack combines two of the most researched supplements for performance and recovery—working together to support strong muscles, durable joints, and connective tissue resilience. This stack includes 10g of Collagen Peptides and 5g of Creatine Monohydrate, ideal for athletes, active individuals, or anyone focused on aging well and moving pain-free.

Creatine fuels muscle energy and performance while supporting cognitive function. Collagen aids in the repair and maintenance of tendons, ligaments, and skin. Taken daily, this pairing supports total body strength and structural integrity from the inside out.

name: Collagen Peptides
description_html: Momentous Collagen Peptides deliver clinically backed support for joint health, connective tissue, and healthy aging with a targeted formula of 10g grass-fed bovine collagen, 5g FORTIGEL® collagen peptides, and Vitamin C to support collagen synthesis. Designed for athletes and active individuals, this daily collagen supplement helps strengthen tendons and ligaments, improve mobility and recovery, and promote healthy skin, hair, and nails.

name: Collagen Peptides 10-Travel Packs
description_html: Momentous Collagen Peptides deliver clinically backed support for joint health, connective tissue, and healthy aging with a targeted formula of 10g grass-fed bovine collagen, 5g FORTIGEL® collagen peptides, and Vitamin C to support collagen synthesis. Designed for athletes and active individuals, this daily collagen supplement helps strengthen tendons and ligaments, improve mobility and recovery, and promote healthy skin, hair, and nails.

name: Collagen Shot 15-Packs
description_html:
Collagen Shot 15-Packs provide 10g of hydrolyzed bovine collagen peptides and 35mg of vitamin C in a convenient, ready-to-drink format, scientifically formulated to support joint health, tendon and ligament strength, and faster recovery. 


Taken daily, especially before training, this NSF Certified for Sport® collagen supplement promotes collagen synthesis, improves mobility, and helps maintain the structural integrity of connective tissues for long-term performance and injury prevention. Ideal for athletes, active individuals, and anyone seeking to protect joints, enhance recovery, and support healthy aging.

name: Complete Female Athlete Stack
description_html:
The Complete Female Athlete Stack was developed with Dr. Andy Galpin to support the unique performance and recovery needs of women. This comprehensive stack includes Creatine, Omega-3, Vitamin D3, and Collagen Peptides—each selected to optimize strength, support joint health, and promote long-term resilience.

Creatine enhances muscle energy and brain function, Omega-3 and Vitamin D3 support immune and hormonal balance, and Collagen strengthens connective tissues like tendons and ligaments. Together, these ingredients help female athletes train harder, recover faster, and maintain peak performance over time.

name: Complete Sleep Stack
description_html:
The Complete Sleep Stack combines four research-backed ingredients—Magnesium L-Threonate, Apigenin, Inositol, and L-Theanine—to promote deep, uninterrupted sleep and next-day clarity. Designed to work synergistically, these ingredients calm the nervous system, regulate neurotransmitters, and help ease the mind into a restorative sleep cycle.

Magnesium L-Threonate enhances cognitive recovery, Apigenin and L-Theanine promote relaxation and stress reduction, and Inositol helps regulate mood and nighttime wakeups. This non-melatonin sleep solution is ideal for those seeking consistent, high-quality rest without next-day grogginess.

name: Creatine
description_html:
Momentous Creatine features 5g of Creapure®—the purest, most studied form of creatine monohydrate—per serving to support strength, power, and cellular energy. Trusted by athletes and researchers alike, creatine helps regenerate ATP, the primary energy source for both muscle contractions and brain function.

Daily use of creatine has been shown to improve performance, support lean muscle growth, and enhance cognitive clarity. It’s NSF Certified for Sport® and unflavored for easy mixing into any routine, making it a foundational supplement for both mental and physical performance.

name: Creatine - 30 Servings
description_html:
Momentous Creatine features 5g of Creapure®—the purest, most studied form of creatine monohydrate—per serving to support strength, power, and cellular energy. Trusted by athletes and researchers alike, creatine helps regenerate ATP, the primary energy source for both muscle contractions and brain function.


Daily use of creatine has been shown to improve performance, support lean muscle growth, and enhance cognitive clarity. It’s NSF Certified for Sport® and unflavored for easy mixing into any routine, making it a foundational supplement for both mental and physical performance.

name: Creatine 15-Travel Packs
description_html:
Creatine 15-Travel Packs provide 5g of pure Creapure® creatine monohydrate in convenient, single-serve sachets—ideal for travel, races, or training on the go. Creatine is one of the most extensively studied and effective supplements for increasing strength, improving high-intensity performance, and supporting brain function.

These travel packs make it easy to stay consistent with your routine wherever you are. With no fillers, flavors, or additives, you get clean, clinically effective creatine for muscle energy, cognitive support, and recovery.

name: Creatine Chews 150-Count
description_html:
Meet the first chewable creatine made to The Momentous Standard™. Each delicious chew delivers 1 gram of pure Creapure® creatine monohydrate—the gold standard trusted by over 200 pro and college teams. No unnecessary fillers, no artificial ingredients, and NSF Certified for Sport® to guarantee label accuracy and quality.

Perfect for athletes, busy professionals, or anyone chasing performance, these chewable creatine tablets make it easy to build strength, recover faster, and stay mentally sharp—anytime, anywhere.

name: Creatine Chews Flavor Stack
description_html:
Meet the easiest way to find your favorite creatine routine. The Momentous Creatine Chews Variety Pack includes all three flavors—Lemon Lime, Strawberry, and Mango—each delivering 1 gram of pure creatine monohydrate in a convenient chewable form.

Made to The Momentous Standard™, these NSF Certified for Sport® chews are trusted by over 200 pro and collegiate teams. No artificial ingredients, no unnecessary fillers—just clean, clinically backed performance you can take anywhere.

name: Creatine Chews Travel Case
description_html: Designed to hold 10 of our Creatine Chews, this travel case helps you maintain performance-building habits, no matter how demanding your schedule. The lightweight metal case fits easily into gym bags and suitcases, allowing you to bring two servings of Chews wherever you go.

name: Dont Buy Test Product
description_html:
Momentous Essential Grass-Fed Whey is the highest quality whey protein available, period. Our grass-fed whey isolate is cold-processed to preserve native protein structures allowing for greater bioavailability. We also include ProHydrolase - a clinically researched enzyme blend that supports the digestion and absorption of protein. Mixes easily and tastes great in water, almond milk, smoothies, or other recipes.

Servings Size: 1 scoop
Servings per container: 24 servings

options.name: Flavors, Some Only Available for One Time Purchase

name: Elite Sleep
description_html:
Elite Sleep is a research-backed, melatonin-based sleep aid designed to help you fall asleep faster, stay asleep longer, and support nighttime recovery. Formulated with a blend of Melatonin, Tart Cherry, L-Theanine, and Valerian Root, it helps regulate your body’s natural sleep-wake cycle while promoting a calm, relaxed state before bed.

This formula is ideal for athletes, shift workers, frequent travelers, or anyone needing short-term support to reset their sleep rhythm. Elite Sleep is not intended for daily use but is perfect for periods of disrupted or irregular sleep.

name: Female Athlete Stack
description_html:
The Female Athlete Stack was developed with Dr. Stacy Sims to meet the unique physiological needs of women in training. Featuring Grass-Fed Whey Protein, Collagen Peptides, and Creatine, this stack supports muscle recovery, connective tissue health, and cognitive performance—while addressing the lower natural creatine stores often found in women.

Whey Protein helps build and repair lean muscle, Collagen Peptides support joint and ligament integrity, and Creatine enhances energy availability and brain function. Together, these ingredients form a powerful foundation for female athletes looking to optimize strength, resilience, and overall performance.

name: Fiber+
description_html: Your gut is the foundation for everything—how well you absorb nutrients, stay focused, recover from training, and remain energized day to day. Fiber+ delivers all three essential fiber types—soluble, insoluble, and prebiotic resistant starch—to support smoother digestion, fuel a healthy microbiome, and promote metabolic and mental balance. It’s fiber, engineered for performance—not just regularity.

name: Fiber+ 10-Travel Packs
description_html: Your gut is the foundation for everything—how well you absorb nutrients, stay focused, recover, and stay energized on the go. Fiber+ Travel Packs deliver all three essential fiber types—soluble, insoluble, and prebiotic resistant starch—in a convenient, single-serve format to support digestion, fuel a healthy microbiome, and keep you performing wherever you are.

name: Fiber+ Exclusive
description_html:
Momentous Fiber+: a leveled-up fiber formula containing both soluble and insoluble fibers plus resistant starch. This targeted formula takes a multi-dimensional approach to gut health, promoting comfortable and regular digestion, a diverse gut microbiome, and steady energy levels—all starting at the source.

Developed in partnership with Arnold Schwarzenegger’s Pump Club, this is fiber built different—made for those who know it’s the trend-proof fundamentals that set the standard for Performance for Life™.

name: Focus & Cognition Stack
description_html:
The Focus & Cognition Stack combines Tyrosine, Omega-3, and Alpha GPC to support mental clarity, attention, and long-term brain health. Ideal for high performers, students, or athletes, this stack is designed to enhance focus, reduce cognitive fatigue, and improve processing speed.

Tyrosine supports neurotransmitter production for motivation and stress resilience. Omega-3s aid neural communication and protect against inflammation, while Alpha GPC delivers bioavailable choline to fuel memory and cognitive performance. Together, these ingredients create a powerful daily formula for sharper thinking and sustained mental energy.

name: Follicular Phase Support Stack
description_html:
The Follicular Phase Support Stack is designed with Dr. Stacy Sims to help female athletes perform at their best during the first half of the menstrual cycle. This phase, which begins on the first day of menstruation and ends at ovulation, is marked by fluctuating estrogen and increased risk of iron deficiency. This stack combines Vitamin D3 and Omega-3 to target those specific needs.

Vitamin D3 helps boost iron absorption—essential for maintaining energy and performance—while Omega-3 supports a healthy inflammatory response and joint function. Together, they help reduce fatigue, improve recovery, and support hormonal balance for women training through the follicular phase.

name: Foundational Sleep Stack
description_html: The Foundational Sleep Bundle includes three potent ingredients, Magnesium L-Threonate, Apigenin, and L-Theanine, that prime your body for sleep and help you build a powerful nighttime routine. The Foundational Sleep Bundle includes Magnesium L-Threonate, renowned for its unique ability to penetrate the brain and improve cognitive function; L-Theanine, which helps calm the nervous system by increasing the levels of key neurotransmitters; and Apigenin, which helps reduce feelings of stress and encourage higher-quality sleep by binding to receptors in the brain.

name: Fuel
description_html: Momentous Fuel is an expertly designed carb + electrolyte formula built to sustain prolonged workouts, training, and gametime intensity, making it a top choice for pro sports teams, first responders, and human performance leaders. It embodies what makes us, us: clean ingredients, rigorous testing, and performance without compromise.

name: Fuel 10-Travel Packs
description_html: Momentous Fuel is an expertly designed carb + electrolyte formula built to sustain prolonged workouts, training, and gametime intensity, making it a top choice for pro sports teams, first responders, and human performance leaders. It embodies what makes us, us: clean ingredients, rigorous testing, and performance without compromise.

name: Inositol
description_html:
Inositol is a naturally occurring carbohydrate that plays a key role in brain signaling, mood regulation, and sleep quality. As a precursor to serotonin, dopamine, and melatonin pathways, Inositol supports a calm mind, balanced mood, and healthy circadian rhythm—making it especially useful for those struggling with nighttime wakeups or anxious thinking.

Each capsule contains pure Inositol to support relaxation, improve sleep continuity, and promote mental clarity. It's a gentle, non-sedating option for managing stress and improving overall sleep health.

name: Iron+
description_html: Momentous Iron+, with Vitamin C to enhance absorption and B Complex to support energy, is a once-daily supplement critical to the support of daily energy levels as well as physical and cognitive performance. Keeping levels sufficient is crucial to avoiding deficiency, as iron is the most common nutrient deficiency worldwide. Momentous uses patented Ferrochel® iron (as ferrous bisglycinate chelate) to ensure maximum absorption and minimize stomach upset often caused by iron supplements.

name: L-Glutamine
description_html:
L-Glutamine is a conditionally essential amino acid that plays a critical role in muscle repair, immune function, and gut health. It’s the most abundant amino acid in the body and becomes especially important during times of physical stress, intense training, or illness.

This supplement helps support post-exercise recovery by reducing muscle breakdown, maintaining gut lining integrity, and fueling immune cells. It’s an ideal addition for athletes, endurance trainers, or anyone focused on performance and recovery from the inside out.

name: L-Theanine
description_html:
L-Theanine is a naturally occurring amino acid found in tea leaves that promotes calm, focused mental states without causing drowsiness. It works by increasing alpha brain wave activity and supporting neurotransmitters like GABA and serotonin—helping you stay relaxed yet alert.

Often used to reduce acute stress, improve focus, and support the transition into restful sleep, L-Theanine is a safe, non-sedating option for managing mental performance and emotional balance throughout the day.

name: Longevity
description_html: Momentous Longevity is a science-led formula designed to support your body at the cellular level. Combining six clinically-studied bioactives—Niagen® Nicotinamide Riboside, NAC, Betaine, PQQ, Vitamin C, and B Vitamins—Longevity goes beyond NAD⁺ to support core functions of cellular health: energy production, stress resilience, DNA integrity, cellular system balance, and brain health. Backed by peer-reviewed research and NSF Certified for Sport®, this daily formula helps you stay strong, sharp, and resilient for life.

name: Magnesium L-Threonate
description_html:
Magnesium L-Threonate is a specialized form of magnesium designed to effectively cross the blood-brain barrier, supporting brain health, cognitive performance, and sleep quality. Research has shown it can increase magnesium levels in the brain, a key factor in synaptic plasticity, memory formation, and calm neurological activity.

This formula uses Magtein®, the patented and clinically studied form of Magnesium L-Threonate. It is designed to support focus, relaxation, and deep, restorative sleep without sedation.

name: Magnesium Malate
description_html:
Magnesium Malate is a highly bioavailable form of magnesium that supports energy production, muscle recovery, and overall metabolic health. As a cofactor in over 600 enzymatic reactions, magnesium is essential for everything from ATP synthesis to nerve transmission and muscle relaxation.

This form, bound to malic acid, is particularly effective for enhancing stamina, easing post-workout soreness, and supporting cardiovascular and neuromuscular function. Ideal for daily use, it helps keep your body functioning at its peak under stress or heavy training.

name: Male Hormone Support Stack
description_html:
The Male Hormone Support Stack combines Tongkat Ali and Zinc to naturally support testosterone production, energy levels, and overall male vitality. This stack is designed to help active men maintain hormonal balance, improve mood, and enhance strength and performance under physical and mental stress.

Tongkat Ali is a traditional herb known to help regulate cortisol and support healthy testosterone levels. Zinc plays a key role in hormone metabolism, immune function, and muscle repair. Together, they offer targeted support for stamina, libido, and male hormonal health.

name: Momentous x lululemon Back to Life Sport Bottle
description_html: Designed exclusively for lululemon Perks members, this special-edition Momentous x lululemon sport bottle ($54 value) is free with orders $75+. The 32oz capacity makes staying hydrated effortless, and vacuum insulated stainless steel keeps drinks cold for hours. Great for your workouts, commutes, and everything in between.

name: Multivitamin
description_html:
The Momentous Multivitamin is a comprehensive blend of essential vitamins, minerals, and phytonutrients designed to fill common dietary gaps and support overall health, energy, and immune function. Sourced from bioavailable forms and modeled after nutrient-dense whole foods, it delivers what your body needs without unnecessary fillers or megadosing.

Whether you’re an athlete pushing physical limits or simply looking for balanced daily support, this formula provides the critical micronutrients that fuel cellular function, metabolism, and long-term well-being.

name: Nightly Sleep 30-Pack
description_html:
The Sleep 30-Pack delivers a full month of melatonin-free, research-backed sleep support with a calming blend of Magnesium L-Threonate, Apigenin, and L-Theanine. Together, these ingredients help ease the body and mind into a restful state, reduce nighttime wakeups, and promote deeper, higher-quality sleep.

Ideal for anyone seeking consistent, restorative rest without the use of melatonin, this formula supports the natural sleep-wake cycle, reduces stress, and helps you wake up feeling refreshed and mentally clear.

name: Nightly Sleep 5-Pack
description_html: Sleep is an expert-curated and science-backed combination of Magnesium L-Threonate, L-Theanine, and Apigenin to help you fall asleep faster, enjoy deeper rest, and wake up refreshed. This non-habit forming protocol supports relaxation and enhances your natural sleep cycle, so you feel rejuvenated without the grogginess. Each single-serve pouch makes it convenient to add better sleep to your routine.

name: Nightly Sleep Stack
description_html:
The Nightly Sleep Stack is a science-backed combination of Magnesium L-Threonate, Apigenin, and L-Theanine designed to promote deep, restorative sleep and next-day mental clarity. This stack targets the brain’s natural calming pathways to help you fall asleep faster, stay asleep longer, and wake up feeling refreshed.

Magnesium L-Threonate supports cognitive recovery and sleep quality by increasing magnesium levels in the brain. Apigenin and L-Theanine work together to calm the nervous system, reduce stress, and enhance the transition into sleep. Perfect for anyone seeking a non-melatonin solution to improve both sleep depth and mental performance.

name: Omega-3
description_html:
Momentous Omega-3 delivers a clinically effective dose of 1,600mg of EPA and DHA in a clean 1:1 ratio, sustainably sourced from Norway. Designed to support brain function, cardiovascular health, inflammation balance, and muscle recovery, this formula is NSF Certified for Sport® and tested for purity and heavy metals.

Ideal for daily use, Omega-3 helps optimize performance and long-term health—without the fishy aftertaste. It’s foundational support for anyone training hard, thinking hard, or aging well.

name: Omega-3 & Multi Stack
description_html:
The Omega-3 & Multi Stack provides foundational daily support for overall health, performance, and recovery. Combining a high-quality Multivitamin with sustainably sourced Omega-3s, this stack helps fill common nutrient gaps while promoting cardiovascular health, cognitive function, and a healthy inflammatory response.

The Multivitamin delivers essential vitamins, minerals, and phytonutrients in bioavailable forms to support energy production, immune defense, and cellular function. Paired with 1600mg of EPA and DHA from Omega-3s, this daily duo is ideal for those seeking comprehensive, baseline nutritional support to feel and perform their best.

name: Omega-3 Travel Packs
description_html:
The Omega-3 Travel Packs deliver the same high-quality, sustainably sourced EPA and DHA—1,600mg per serving—in a convenient single-serve format. These softgel packs are ideal for athletes, travelers, or anyone who needs Omega-3 support on the go without compromising purity or potency.

Each serving helps reduce inflammation, support brain and cardiovascular health, and promote joint recovery. NSF Certified for Sport® and free of fishy aftertaste, these travel packs make daily Omega-3s simple, portable, and effective.

name: PR Lotion® Bottle
description_html:
PR Lotion delivers sodium bicarbonate directly through the skin to help buffer lactic acid, reduce muscle soreness, and improve training capacity. Used by elite athletes across endurance and power sports, this topical formula supports high-intensity performance without the GI discomfort often associated with oral bicarbonate.

Ideal for hard training days, races, or heavy lifting sessions, PR Lotion helps you push longer, recover faster, and adapt better—giving your muscles the support they need, exactly where they need it.

name: PR Lotion® Buy 4, Get 1 Free. $175 Value
description_html: PR Lotion® is the world's first and only lotion that delivers the natural electrolyte sodium bicarbonate to your working muscles directly via your skin using patented technology. By buffering rising acidity levels in your working muscles, PR Lotion® helps to increase power output, combat fatigue, and decrease post-workout muscle soreness.

name: Peri & Post Menopause Support Stack
description_html:
The Peri & Post Menopause Support Stack addresses the unique needs of women during and after menopause. This targeted combination of Creatine, Collagen Peptides, Turmeric, Alpha GPC, and Vitamin D3 is designed to support strength, cognitive clarity, joint health, and inflammation management during this pivotal life phase.

Creatine and Collagen help preserve muscle mass and maintain bone and connective tissue integrity, while Turmeric and Vitamin D3 modulate inflammation and enhance immune health. Alpha GPC supports brain function, helping you stay sharp, focused, and energized. It’s a science-backed solution to help women stay strong, resilient, and mentally clear through menopause and beyond.

name: Promixx Pill Case
description_html: A compact, intelligently designed pill case built to simplify your daily supplement routine. The Promixx Pill Case features secure compartments, a twist-lock lid, and a magnetic, stackable design that keeps your capsules organized, protected, and always within reach, whether you’re at home, at the gym, or on the go.

name: Promixx Pursuit Shaker Bottle
description_html:
The PROMiXX PURSUITClassic Shaker Bottle is your go-to companion for clean, effortless mixing—whether you're at the gym, at work, or on the move. Made from ECOZEN, a premium plant-based plastic, it’s BPA-free, odor-resistant, and built to last. The leakproof design and carry loop make it easy to toss in your bag and take anywhere.

What really sets it apart? The snap-fit agitator. No noisy wire balls or clumpy shakes—just smooth, consistent results every time. With its sleek, durable design and sustainable materials, the Pursuit shaker brings together performance, convenience, and style in one essential bottle.

name: Pump Club's Brain Protection Stack
description_html:
Think better. Sleep deeper. Recover smarter. This stack combines three science-backed supplements—Omega-3, Creatine, and Magnesium L-Threonate—to help you protect and power your brain.

Omega-3 supports brain structure and fights inflammation. Creatine fuels mental energy and cognitive performance. Magnesium L-Threonate improves sleep and supports long-term memory and focus. If you care about your mind as much as your muscles, this is your stack.

name: Pump Club's Performance Stack
description_html:
This duo covers the basics better than most full supplement shelves. Creatine and Whey Protein, two of the most researched and proven ingredients, work together to build strength, support muscle recovery, and power your training.

Creatine fuels your muscles and brain with cellular energy to boost performance and aid recovery. Grass-fed Whey Protein provides 20g of clean, fast-digesting protein to help build and repair muscle. No fluff, just the essentials—used daily by The Pump Club.

name: Recovery
description_html:
Momentous Recovery is a performance-focused post-workout formula designed to optimize muscle repair, replenish glycogen stores, and reduce exercise-induced soreness. Featuring a clinically supported 2:1 ratio of fast-acting carbohydrates to grass-fed whey protein, plus amino acids and electrolytes, it delivers comprehensive recovery support in one simple shake.

Ideal for endurance athletes, strength trainers, and anyone serious about recovery, this formula helps your body rebuild and rehydrate efficiently—so you can train consistently and perform at your best.

name: Resveratrol
description_html:
Resveratrol is a potent polyphenol found in the skin of red grapes and certain berries, known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. It supports cellular health, promotes healthy aging, and helps defend against oxidative stress—making it a valuable daily supplement for long-term vitality and performance.

Often associated with cardiovascular and brain health, Resveratrol helps protect cells from damage, support metabolic function, and maintain healthy inflammation levels. It’s an ideal addition for anyone looking to promote longevity and protect against the wear and tear of daily stress.

name: Rhodiola Rosea
description_html:
Rhodiola Rosea is a powerful adaptogen traditionally used to combat fatigue and improve mental performance. Modern research supports energy metabolism, cognitive focus, and stress resilience by modulating cortisol and supporting fatigue and stress-related performance. 

This makes Rhodiola a versatile supplement for athletes, professionals, and anyone under heavy mental or physical load. By reducing fatigue and enhancing endurance, it helps you stay sharp, recover faster, and perform at a higher level every day.

name: The Complete Expert Stack
description_html:
The Complete Expert Stack is a comprehensive collection of products designed to support cognitive function, sleep, hormone balance, and overall health. 


This comprehensive suite of supplements—from Omega-3 to Acetyl-L-Carnitine— helps you ensure every corner of your well-being is addressed, optimized, and harmonized.

name: The Momentous Three
description_html: The Momentous Three™: Protein, Creatine, and Omega-3—the 3 nutrients Momentous’ expert ecosystem identified as daily non-negotiables and the biggest impact drivers for longevity of performance and overall health. Taken daily, this protocol supports muscle strength, growth, and recovery, as well as cognitive function including focus, mental sharpness, and memory recall.

name: The Momentous Three - Vegan
description_html:
The Momentous Three™: Protein, Creatine, and Omega-3—the 3 nutrients Momentous’ expert ecosystem identified as daily non-negotiables and the biggest impact drivers for longevity of performance and overall health. Taken daily, this protocol supports muscle strength, growth, and recovery, as well as cognitive function including focus, mental sharpness, and memory recall. 

 

This Vegan version, including 100% Plant Protein Powder, Creatine Monohydrate and Vegan Omega-3, makes plant-based nutrition simple, delicious and effective.

name: The Women’s Three™
description_html: The Women’s Three is a daily health system comprised of Iron+, Calcium, and Vitamin D3 2000IU and developed in collaboration with renowned expert Dr. Stacy Sims specifically for female biology—with a targeted AM/PM dosing protocol to maximize absorption in supporting daily energy, maintaining strong, healthy bones, and promoting long-term resilience.

name: Tim Ferriss x Momentous Promixx Pursuit Shaker Bottle
description_html:
The Tim Ferriss x Momentous PROMiXX PURSUIT Shaker is built for high performers who demand function, simplicity, and sustainability—just like Tim. This limited-edition shaker combines premium design with purpose-driven utility, delivering smooth, clump-free shakes without the noise or mess.

Made with ECOZEN, a plant-based, BPA-free plastic, it’s as clean and durable as the supplements it carries. Featuring Tim’s signature minimalist aesthetic and laser-focused performance ethos, this shaker is your daily companion for fueling better routines—whether you're training, traveling, or just optimizing your day.

name: Tim Ferriss x Momentous Promixx Shaker Bottle GWP
Tim's Performance Stack
description_html:
Bestselling author, podcaster, and lifestyle guru Tim Ferriss believes in the power of routine and consistency—and a trusted part of his daily routine is this Performance Stack.

 

Consisting of Grass-Fed Whey Protein, Creatine, and Magnesium L-Threonate, this stack helps Tim achieve optimal cognitive performance, quality sleep, and enhanced recovery so that he can continue performing at his best when it matters most.

name: Tongkat 60 Day Supply
description_html:
Tongkat Ali, also known as Longjack (Eurycoma longifolia), is a traditional Southeast Asian herb known for its ability to support healthy testosterone levels, boost energy, and improve mood. It’s particularly beneficial for men looking to enhance physical performance, muscle growth, and hormonal balance.

Tongkat Ali has also been shown to help regulate stress hormones like cortisol, supporting resilience and recovery during periods of high physical or mental demand. It’s an ideal daily supplement for active individuals seeking natural support for stamina, strength, and overall vitality.

name: Tongkat Ali
description_html:
Tongkat Ali, also known as Longjack (Eurycoma longifolia), is a traditional Southeast Asian herb known for its ability to support healthy testosterone levels, boost energy, and improve mood. It’s particularly beneficial for men looking to enhance physical performance, muscle growth, and hormonal balance.

Tongkat Ali has also been shown to help regulate stress hormones like cortisol, supporting resilience and recovery during periods of high physical or mental demand. It’s an ideal daily supplement for active individuals seeking natural support for stamina, strength, and overall vitality.

name: TrendProof Hat
description_html: The TrendProof Hat reflects the belief that strength is built through consistency. Embroidered with Arnold Schwarzenegger’s signature and the Momentous x TrendProof logo, it represents a shared standard rooted in discipline and longevity. Crafted from structured cotton twill with reinforced stitching and a secure snap-back closure, it delivers a clean, durable silhouette designed for daily wear. Simple. Resilient. Built to last.

name: TrendProof Shaker Bottle
description_html: Created in partnership with Arnold Schwarzenegger the TrendProof Bottle embodies fundamentals done right. Built on a YETI® Yonder platform with Helimix® vortex technology, it delivers clean, whisk-free mixing in a leakproof, shatter-resistant design engineered for long-term use.

name: TrendProof Tank
description_html: From the TrendProof Collection with Arnold Schwarzenegger, this performance tank is built for movement rooted in consistency. Crafted on Rhone’s Serene platform, it features lightweight 4-way stretch, chafe-free construction, and GOLDFUSION® anti-odor technology. The result is a cropped silhouette that performs with strength and intention.

name: TrendProof Tee
description_html: In partnership with Arnold Schwarzenegger, we created a tee that embodies the TrendProof standard — discipline over distraction and longevity over hype. Powered by Rhone’s technical fabric innovation, it offers mobility, durability, and built-in protection so you can train hard, recover well, and repeat.

name: Turmeric
description_html:
Turmeric is a powerful plant-based supplement rich in curcuminoids—natural compounds known for their strong anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Used for centuries in traditional medicine, Turmeric supports joint health, muscle recovery, and a balanced inflammatory response, especially after intense physical activity.

Ideal for athletes and active individuals, Turmeric helps reduce soreness and support long-term joint integrity. Its systemic benefits also extend to heart, brain, and immune health, making it a daily staple for those seeking both performance and protection.

name: Tyrosine
description_html: Tyrosine is a conditionally essential amino acid that supports cognitive performance, focus, and resilience under stress. As a precursor to key neurotransmitters like dopamine and norepinephrine, it helps maintain mental clarity and alertness during periods of physical exertion, fatigue, or high cognitive demand. Whether you're training, working, or navigating long days, Tyrosine helps you stay sharp and perform when it matters most.

name: Ubiquinol
description_html:
Ubiquinol is the most bioavailable and active form of CoQ10, a powerful antioxidant that plays a key role in cellular energy production. This supplement supports mitochondrial function, helping your body produce ATP—the energy currency of your cells—more efficiently and with less oxidative stress.

Ubiquinol is especially beneficial for cognitive performance, endurance, and overall vitality, making it ideal for aging individuals, athletes, and anyone with high physical or mental demands. It also helps defend against cellular damage by neutralizing free radicals at the source of energy production.

name: Vegan Omega-3
description_html: Momentous Vegan Omega-3 is the most powerful plant-based omega-3 formula available, containing a market-leading 500mg each of EPA + DHA for a total 1,000mg delivery of Omega oil per serving. It’s sourced from Algal Oil—the original source of omegas consumed by fish. The result is a formula that provides crucial cell membrane support, contributing to improved brain function, muscle recovery, and overall resilience, in a clean, highly effective capsule that’s 100% free of animal products and unnecessary fillers.

name: Vital Aminos
description_html: Vital Aminos provides a complete spectrum of essential amino acids—the building blocks your body needs to repair, rebuild, and perform. This formula combines all nine EAAs with four additional aminos to support muscle protein synthesis, recovery, and metabolic function. Ideal for use around training or between meals, it helps maintain consistent amino acid availability to support performance over time.

name: Vitamin D3 2000 IU
description_html:
Vitamin D3 2000 IU is a vegan-friendly, allergen-free formula delivered in organic extra virgin olive oil for optimal bioavailability. Designed for daily use, this supplement supports bone health, immune defense, muscle function, and a healthy inflammatory response.

Vitamin D3 plays a vital role in calcium absorption, hormonal balance, and overall vitality. With 2000 IU per serving, this moderate-dose option is ideal for those looking to maintain steady vitamin D levels as part of a balanced wellness routine.

name: Vitamin D3 5000 IU
description_html:
Vitamin D3 5000 IU is a high-potency supplement designed to help maintain healthy vitamin D levels and support bone strength, immune function, and inflammation balance. This fat-soluble nutrient plays a key role in calcium absorption, helping to preserve skeletal health and muscular function—especially important for athletes and individuals with low sun exposure.

Sourced from lanolin, our D3 5000 IU is ideal for those needing a stronger daily dose to meet their health and performance goals. It’s a simple but powerful tool for maintaining energy, resilience, and recovery.

name: Whey Protein Isolate
description_html: Momentous Whey Protein Isolate delivers 20g of high-quality, grass-fed protein per serving to support muscle recovery, performance, and daily nutrition. Sourced from European dairy farms held to rigorous regulatory standards, our whey comes from grass-fed cows free of hormones, steroids, and rBST. Cold-processed and micro-filtered to preserve its full amino acid profile, this protein is designed for superior absorption and minimal GI discomfort. We add ProHydrolase®, a clinically studied enzyme, to further enhance digestion and absorption—so you get the most out of your protein routine. NSF Certified for Sport®, our formula is rigorously tested to meet the highest standards of purity and safety.

name: Whey Protein Isolate - Flavor Series
description_html:
Consistency is the cornerstone of progress, and hitting your daily protein goals is foundational to you achieving Performance for Life™. We’re here to make that even easier, and more delicious, with new flavors.

Momentous Whey Protein Isolate has long been trusted by those striving for more; backed by The Momentous Standard™, our #1 product delivers the highest quality ingredients and flavors with no compromise—no artificial ingredients, sweeteners, gums or fillers, just naturally-flavored options to keep your protein routine easy and fresh.

name: Whey Protein Isolate 10-Travel Packs
description_html: The most efficacious Whey Protein Isolate available, in convenient single-serving travel packs. Protein is a must for everyone, every day when Performance for Life™ is the goal, and our travel packs make that easier than ever, so you can focus more energy on the next goal to hit. 20g of high-quality, grass-fed whey protein per pack supports muscle recovery, performance, and daily nutrition wherever life takes you. NSF Certified for Sport®, our formula is rigorously tested to meet the highest standards of purity and safety.

name: Womens GI Support Stack
description_html:
The Women’s GI Support Stack is designed to support digestive health in active women, particularly those experiencing estrogen-related GI sensitivity. Developed in collaboration with Dr. Stacy Sims, this targeted blend includes Creatine, L-Glutamine, Alpha GPC, Turmeric, Tyrosine, and Vitamin D3—ingredients shown to reduce inflammation, strengthen the intestinal lining, and support optimal gut function.

Whether you're dealing with hormone-driven digestive distress or simply want to optimize gut health for performance and recovery, this stack delivers foundational support for the GI tract, cognitive health, and systemic inflammation. Ideal for women navigating the physical demands of training and hormonal fluctuation.

name: Zinc
description_html: Zinc is an essential trace mineral involved in hundreds of enzymatic processes that support immune health, hormone regulation, and cellular repair. This highly bioavailable form is designed for optimal absorption, helping maintain adequate levels even under increased physical or mental stress. With consistent use, it supports recovery, metabolic function, and overall resilience. NSF Certified for Sport® and independently tested for purity and label accuracy.
